product: Dashboard date controls and notification features
tagline: Relative dates update: The relative dates in date and date range pickers now include the current day.
what_it_does: Relative dates update: The relative dates in date and date range pickers now include the current day. Error message improvement: Error messages for calculated measures now indicate that filter clauses are not supported. Publish notification feature: Dashboard authors can now send publish notifications when updating a dashboard.
why_it_matters: Error message improvement: Error messages for calculated measures now indicate that filter clauses are not supported.
plain_summary: Relative dates update: The relative dates in date and date range pickers now include the current day. Error message improvement: Error messages for calculated measures now indicate that filter clauses are not supported.
key_takeaway: Relative dates update: The relative dates in date and date range pickers now include the current day.
